title: The Minecraft Movie Mod
description: Adds stuff from the Minecraft Movie to the game
body:
This mod REQUIRES Geckolib to function.
Download it from here: [Geckolib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib/versions)
This mod adds goofy stuff from the Minecraft Movie Trailer to the game
## Ghast Airship
 This is a ghast that you can ride and control its movement. It can fly upto 200 blocks!
## Chained Buckets
 This is an item which can be used to pick two liquids i.e. Water, Lava, Powder Snow
## Steve
 This is just Jack Black as Steve as shown in the trailer.
He just keeps on shouting "I AM STEVE".
He can fight back and when you spawn multiple Steves together they all start fighting each other and arguing who is the real Steve.
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/PMYKlnJBFFU" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
